title: Absconding doctor taken into custody in Angamaly ‘hit-and-run’ case in Kerala
description: Cyriac George, a native of Athirampuzha in Kottayam, detained from a resort at Wagamon where he was allegedly hiding following the alleged hit-and-run incident in which in which a 19-year-old college student, Jasliya Johnson, was killed on February 28
